---
name: Niche preset contribution
about: Propose a new niche preset for config.py
title: '[Niche] '
labels: enhancement, niche-preset
assignees: ''
---

## Niche name
e.g. `food-bloggers`, `travel-vlog`, `tech-reviews`

## Why this niche needs its own preset
What's different about hashtag patterns, posting times, content angle, compliance rules?

## Proposed hashtags
List 8-12 hashtag seeds (no `#` prefix needed):

- example1
- example2

## Seed accounts (optional)
2-5 representative creators in this niche (Instagram handles).

## Compliance rules
- Max caption chars: [e.g. 220]
- Max hashtags: [e.g. 5]
- Banned words: [e.g. "subscribe", "link in bio"]
- Preferred CTAs: [e.g. "Comment STYLE", "DM me 'fit'"]

## Content angle
1-sentence description of what the niche optimizes for (e.g. "shareable food porn → recipe newsletter funnel").
